/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librcpputils.so -o librcpputils.so CMakeFiles/rcpputils.dir/src/asserts.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rcpputils.dir/src/filesystem_helper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rcpputils.dir/src/find_library.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rcpputils.dir/src/env.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rcpputils.dir/src/shared_library.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
